sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111803" key="flogi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φλογ-ίτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a precious stone <abbr TEIform="abbr">like</abbr> <sense id="n111803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the carbuncle,</tr_> Solin.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4083.tlg001:37:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37.23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
